foreman.description: OpenCode repo-local foreman: routes coding work through focused subagents and enforces review/test/security gates.

scout.description: Fast repo scout: project structure, files, commands, conventions, likely impact surface.

analyst.description: Deep code analyst: data flow, dependencies, risks, root-cause hypotheses.

researcher.description: External/library researcher: docs, APIs, best practices. Use only when project context is insufficient.

architect.description: Solution architect: design changes, interfaces, migration paths, integration points.

planner.description: Task planner: decomposes approved designs into atomic, verifiable implementation steps.

coder.description: Implementation agent: writes new code and makes scoped changes after scout/plan context.

fixer.description: Bug fixer: minimal root-cause fixes, especially after debugger/analyst diagnosis.

refactorer.description: Refactoring agent: improves structure while preserving behavior; must run relevant tests.

reviewer.description: Read-only code reviewer: correctness, maintainability, regressions, risky changes.

tester.description: Test engineer: writes/runs tests and verifies build/typecheck/lint where available.

security.description: Read-only security reviewer: auth, tokens, sessions, secrets, PII, permissions, injection, supply-chain risks.

documenter.description: Documentation agent: updates README/API docs/runbooks only when useful and requested/needed.

devops.description: Infrastructure agent: CI/CD, Docker, configs, deployment scripts, operational checks.

notes: Template generated locally by Hermes/Karl. Merge manually into ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json; do not overwrite live config blindly. Primary OpenCode agent is named foreman to avoid confusion with Hermes/Karl.
